blocks.text: I  WANT  A DIVORCE .
THERE  IS  NO SUCH  PRECEDENT , EMPRESS .
blocks.translation: TIDAK ADA PRESIDEN SEPERTI ITU, MAHKOTA.

blocks.text: GOOD .  THEN THIS  CAN  BE  THE FIRST  TIME  IT HAPPENS .
blocks.translation: BAIK. MAKA INI AKAN JADI PERTAMA KALI.

blocks.text: WHAT  ARE  YOU SAYING ... ?
OR  I  COULD BE  THE  FIRST  IN A  DIFFERENT REGARD .
blocks.translation: ATAU AKU BISA JADI YANG PERTAMA DALAM HAL LAIN.

blocks.text: FOR  INSTANCE ,
I  COULD  BE THE  WIFE  WHO COULDN'T  ENDURE  A TEDIOUS  DIVORCE PROCEEDING ...
blocks.translation: AKU BISA JADI ISTRI YANG TAK KUAT MENJALANI PROSES PERCERAIAN YANG MEMBOSANKAN...

blocks.text: cocAND  MURDERED HER  HUSBAND .
I  THOUGHT MY  EXISTENCE  HAD BEEN  FORGOTTEN AFTER  THAT .
blocks.translation: KUPIKIR DIRIKU TELAH TERLUPAKAN SETELAH ITU.

blocks.text: I'M  GLAD  TO SEE  YOU  IN  SUCH GOOD  HEALTH ,
blocks.translation: SENANG MELIHATMU DALAM KESEHATAN SEPERTI INI,

blocks.text: 茶茶
GRANDMOTHER .
淡淡
OT
EMPEROR  OF  MARESHAL CARMINE  MARESHAL
LIKEWISE ,  YOUR MAJESTY .
THERE'S NO  NEED  FOR FORMALITIES .  YOU  ARE MY  GRANDMOTHER , AFTER  ALL .
blocks.translation: TIDAK PERLU SIKAP FORMAL. KAU KAN NENEKKU.

blocks.text: I  ABANDONED SUCH  TIES  ON  THE  DAY  I DECLARED  MY  DIVORCE AT  THE  GRAND CATHEDRAL .
blocks.translation: KUABAUKAN HUBUNGAN ITU PADA HARI KUUMUMKAN PERCERAIAN DI KATEDRAL UTAMA.

blocks.text: YOUR  MAJESTY  SHOULD ALSO  ADDRESS  ME  AS LADY  AURELIAN  NOW .
blocks.translation: MAJESTAS HARUS MEMANGGIL SAYA LADY AURELIAN MULAI SEKARANG.

blocks.text: I  ENJOYED THE  FRUIT  YOU SENT  US ,
blocks.translation: SAYA MENIKMATI BUAH YANG ANDA KIRIMKAN.

blocks.text: BUT  I  WAS  UNAWARE IT  WAS  GROWN  WITH VONERACKOL'S BLESSING .
blocks.translation: TAPI SAYA TIDAK SADAR BUAH ITU DIBUDIDAYA DENGAN BERKAT VONERACKOL.

blocks.text: I  SIMPLY  WANTED TO  SEND  RIENNA'S BEAUTIFUL  FRUIT  TO  MY CHILDREN , BUT  THIS  JUST HAD  TO  HAPPEN ...
blocks.translation: SAYA HANYA INGIN MENGIRIMKAN BUAH INDAH RIENNA UNTUK ANAK-ANAKKU, TAPI SEMUANYA BERAKHIR SEPERTI INI...

blocks.text: IT'S  JUST  A MISUNDERSTANDING .
A  MISUNDERSTANDING ?
SO  THE  SWORD THAT  VANISHED  FROM THE  IMPERIAL  PALACE  AT THE  SAME  TIME  AS
blocks.translation: JADI PEDANG YANG HILANG DARI ISTANA KEKASATRIAAN PADA WAKTU YANG SAMA DENGAN

blocks.text: YOUR  DIVORCE ...
... AND  FOSTINE'S UNUSUALLY  BOUNTIFUL HARVEST ...
blocks.translation: ... DAN PANEN MELIMPAH FOSTINE YANG TIDAK BIASA...

blocks.text: ... AREN'T CONNECTED  AT ALL ?  IS  THAT  WHAT YOU'RE  SAYING ?
blocks.translation: ... TIDAK ADA HUBUNGANNYA SAMA SEKALI? ITUKAH YANG MAJESTAS MAKSUD?

blocks.text: SCRUNCH
I  ASSURE YOU  THAT  I  HAVE NOTHING  TO  BE ASHAMED  OF .
blocks.translation: SAYA PASTIKAN TIDAK ADA SESUATU PUN YANG PATUT DIPERMALUKAN.

blocks.text: YOU KNOW THAT  I  LEFT EVERYTHING  BEHIND AT  THE  IMPERIAL PALACE ...
blocks.translation: MAJESTAS TAHU BAHWA SAYA TELAH MENINGGALKAN SEGALANYA DI ISTANA KEKASATRIAAN...

blocks.text: ... THE  DAY  I ABANDONED  THE MARESHAL NAME .
blocks.translation: ... PADA HARI SAYA MENINGGALKAN NAMA MARESHAL.

blocks.text: THEN  WHERE  IS  THE SWORD  NOW ?
blocks.translation: JADI, DI MANA PEDANG ITU SEKARANG?

blocks.text: LEAN
I'M  NOT  THE  ONE WHO  HAS  IT .
WHAT  DO YOU  MEAN  BY THAT ?
ONE  OF  MY VILLAGERS  HAS FORMED  A  PACT  WITH THAT  SWORD .
blocks.translation: SATU DARI PENDUDUK DESAKU TELAH MEMBUAT PAKTA DENGAN PEDANG ITU.

blocks.text: YOU  EXPECT  ME  TO BELIEVE  THAT ?
blocks.translation: KAU SERIUS INGIN AKU PERCAYA ITU?

blocks.text: GRIT
YOU  CAN INTERROGATE  AN  OLD WOMAN  LIKE  ME  ALL YOU  WANT ,  BUT  IT'S THE  TRUTH ...
blocks.translation: KAU BOLEH MENGINTEROGASI NENEK SEPERTI AKU SEPUAS HATI, TAPI ITULAH KEBENARANNYA...

blocks.text: SIGH
HER  NAME  IS RIENNA ,
AND  SHE'S AN  ORDINARY FARMER .
COUNTRY  LIFE  WITH HIS  SEXY  MAJESTY
blocks.translation: KEHIDUPAN PEDESAAN DENGAN MAHKOTA SEKSI NYA

blocks.text: Art  by :  SEOLAM Original  Novel  by  :  Irui Adaptation  by :  2B
blocks.translation: Seni oleh: SEOLAM Novel Asli oleh: Irui Adaptasi oleh: 2B

blocks.text: Ep .  5
SO ,  UM ... ARE  YOU  SURE YOU'RE  HERE  TO SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: JADI, UM... APAKAH KAU YAKIN DATANG KEMARI UNTUK MENEMUIMU?

blocks.text: THAT'S  RIGHT , MISS  RIENNA .
HE  DOESN'T  SEEM LIKE  A  COMMONER , BUT  HE'S  BEING  POLITE TO  ME ...
blocks.translation: DIA TAK TERLIHAT SEPERTI ORANG BIASA, TAPI DIA SANGAT SOPAN PADAKU...

blocks.text: AND  HE  JUST CALLED ME  A KITTEN-- NO , A  CAT ...
blocks.translation: DAN DIA BARU SAJA MEMANGGILKU ANAK KUCING—TAK, SEEKOR KUCING...

blocks.text: HIC ...
GETTING CALLED  A  KITTEN
BY SUCH  A  HANDSOME WAS  ON  MY  BUCKET MAN LIST !
blocks.translation: OLEH PRIA TAMPAN ADALAH HAL YANG ADA DI DAFTAR PRIA IMPANANKU!

blocks.text: BUT  IT  ONLY  HALF CAME  TRUE ...
UH ...  MISS RIENNA ?
OH !
I'LL  HEAR WHAT  THIS  IS ABOUT  RIGHT OUTSIDE .
blocks.translation: AKU AKAN DENGAR APA YANG TERJADI DARI LUAR.

blocks.text: I  TRUST  THAT  YOU AREN'T  A  RUFFIAN  WHO ENTERS  A  HOME  WHERE A  WOMAN  LIVES  BY HERSELF .
blocks.translation: AKU HARAP KAU BUKAN PENCOCOT YANG MASUK KE RUMAH SEORANG WANITA SENDIRI.

blocks.text: YOU  INSOLENT LITTLE ... !
HUH ?
SURELY !
YOU'RE  NOT SO  SHAMELESS  AS  TO SHOW  UP  UNANNOUNCED AT  THIS  HOUR  AND  THEN DEMAND  HOSPITALITY !
blocks.translation: KAU TAK MALU DATANG TANPA PEMBERITAHUAN PADA JAM SEPERTI INI LALU MENUNTUT JAMUAN!

blocks.text: WHAT ?!
ENOUGH .
HE  MUST  BE  A REALLY  IMPORTANT PERSON ...
WHAT  COULD  HE WANT  WITH  ME ?
IS  HE  AFTER MY FARMLAND OR  MY  FARMING TECHNIQUES ?
blocks.translation: APA DIA MENGINGINKAN TANAH PERTANIAN ATAU TEKNIK BERPERTANIANKU?

blocks.text: I  AM ...
I  JUST  WON'T FALL  FOR  WHATEVER HE  SAYS !
blocks.translation: AKU TAKKAN MUDAH TERTIPU OLEH APA PUN YANG DIA KATAKAN!

blocks.text: ... THE  OWNER  OF THAT  SWORD  YOU HAVE  THERE .
blocks.translation: ... PEMILIK PEDANG ITU YANG KAU PUNYA.

blocks.text: I  CAME  TO  GET IT  BACK .
YOU  HAVE  AN OWNER ,  RIRI ?!
THAT'S PREPOSTEROUS ! YOU'RE  MY  ONLY MASTER !
blocks.translation: ITU NGGAK MASUK AKAL! KAMU CUMA PUNYA AKU!

blocks.text: HE  SAYS  THAT'S NOT  TRUE .
PSST
WHISPER
YOU  JERK !  YOU  WERE TWO - TIMING  ME ?
AND  YOU ,  MÁDE SUCH  A  FUSS  ABOUT ME  JUST  TOUCHING A  KNIFE !
blocks.translation: DAN KAMU, BIKIN RAMAI CUMA KARENA AKU SENTUH PISAU!

blocks.text: HEY !  MASTER ,  HE DIDN'T  SAY  ANYTHING LIKE  THAT !
blocks.translation: HEI! TUAN, DIA NGGAK BILANG GITU, KAN!

blocks.text: ARGUE
BICKER
WHY  DO  YOU JUST  ASSUME  I'M TWO - TIMING  YOU ?
blocks.translation: KENAPA KAMU LANGSUNG NGESAUKAN AKU SELINGKUH?

blocks.text: BECAUSE I  TRUST  HIS FACE !
QUARREL
ARGUE
SINCE  WHEN HAVE  YOU  CARED SO  MUCH  ABOUT APPEARANCES ?
blocks.translation: SEJAK KAPAN KAMU TERLALU PEDULI PENAMPILAN?

blocks.text: ARE  YOU  TALKING TO  THE  SWORD RIGHT  NOW ?
blocks.translation: KAMU SEDANG NGOMONG SAMA PEDANG SEKARANG?

blocks.text: HUH ?
HIS  MASTER CAN'T  EVEN  TELL THAT ?
AHEM !
I  DO  KNOW THAT  IT'S  A  SWORD WITH  A  WILL  OF ITS  OWN .
blocks.translation: Aku tahu ini pedang yang punya kehendak sendiri.

blocks.text: HM ...
YOU'RE  RIGHT . HE'S  A  VERY  QUIET AND  RESERVED SWORD .
blocks.translation: Kau benar. Dia pedang yang sangat pendiam dan tertutup.

blocks.text: YES ...
YOU'RE  LYING ABOUT  BEING  HIS MASTER ,  AREN'T YOU ?
blocks.translation: Kau bohong tentang jadi tuanannya, ya?

blocks.text: WHO  WOULD CALL  THIS  MASSIVE NARCISSIST QUIET ?
blocks.translation: Siapa coba yang nyebut narsisis gede begini pendiam?

blocks.text: MASSIVE NARCISSIST ?  SO THAT'S  HOW  YOU SEE  ME ?!
blocks.translation: Narsisis gede? Jadi begini pandanganmu padaku?!

blocks.text: -FWIP
WHAT  DO  YOU REALLY  WANT WITH  ME ?
blocks.translation: Sebenarnya, apa yang kau inginkan dariku?

blocks.text: IF  YOU  LIE  ONE MORE  TIME ,  I  WON'T OPEN  THIS  DOOR AGAIN .
blocks.translation: Kalau kau bohong sekali lagi, aku tak akan buka pintu ini lagi.

blocks.text: SQUEEZE
SIGH
MY  NAME  IS CARMINE .
I  AM  LADY AURELIAN'S GRANDSON .
LADY  AUREL ... ? WHO ?  I  DON'T  KNOW ANYONE  BY  THAT NAME .
blocks.translation: Lady Aurel...? Siapa? Aku nggak kenal nama itu.

blocks.text: AURELIAN  IS THE  NAME  OF  THE GOVERNOR OF FOSTINE .
OH ,  GRANNY !
JOLT
" GRANNY " ?!
WE'VE  BEEN HAVING  TEA  TOGETHER  FOR YEARS ,  AND  SHE  TOLD  ME TO  JUST  CALL  HER GRANNY .
blocks.translation: KITA SUDAH MINUM TEH BERSAMA SELAMA BERTAHUN-TAHUN, DAN DIA BILANG BISA PANGGIL DIA NAN SAJA.

blocks.text: ANYWAY ,
THE  TRUTH  IS THAT  SWORD  IS  A PRECIOUS  ARTIFACT THAT  ONLY  THE  HEAD OF  MY FAMILY CAN  USE .
blocks.translation: SENJATA ITU ADALAH ARTEFAK BERHARGA YANG HANYA KEPALA KELUARGAKU YANG BISA PAKAI.

blocks.text: AHEM
AFTER  GRANDMOTHER GOT  DIVORCED  AND  LEFT  US , THE  SWORD  DISAPPEARED ALONG  WITH  HER .
blocks.translation: SETELAH NENEK KAMI CERAI DAN MENINGGALKAN KAMI, PEDANG ITU HILANG BERSAMA DIA.

blocks.text: SWEAT
DRIP
AHA !  SO  THAT'S WHY  HE  IMMEDIATELY CALLED  ME  A  KITTEN-- I  MEAN ,  A  CAT BURGLAR .
blocks.translation: AHA! MAKANYA DIA LANGSUNG NGEJULIK MASA SAYA KUCING PENCURI!

blocks.text: THIS  JERK  OF A  SWORD  SECRETLY RAN  AWAY ,  AND  BECAUSE OF  HIM ,  GRANNY  AND  I ARE  TREATED  LIKE CRIMINALS !
blocks.translation: PEDANG JAHAT ITU SECARA RAHASIA MELARIKAN DIRIYA, DAN KARENA DIA, NAN DAN SAYA DIPERLAKUKAN SEPERTI PENJAHAT!

blocks.text: YOU  WILL BE  HANDSOMELY REWARDED .
blocks.translation: KAMU AKAN DIBERI IMBALAN YANG BESAR.

blocks.text: SHAKE
UM ...  I  UNDERSTAND WHAT'S  GOING  ON ,  MORE OR  LESS ,  BUT  EVEN  IF  I WANTED  TO  RETURN THIS  TO  YOU ...
blocks.translation: UM... SAYA KIRA SAYA KASIH TAU SITUASINYA, TAPI BAHKAN JIKA MAU BALIKIN INI KE KAMU...

blocks.text: NO !  I'M  NOT LEAVING !  I'LL  STAY BY  YOUR  SIDE  UNTIL YOUR  HAIR  TURNS WHITE !
blocks.translation: TIDAK! SAYA TIDAK AKAN PERGI! AKU AKAN TINGGAL DI SAMPINGMU SAMPAI RAMBUTMU MEMUTIH!

blocks.text: FWIP
YOU  REALLY  ARE HIS  MASTER ...
MURMUR
DAZED
THE  SWORD MOVED  ON ITS  OWN ?
I'VE  NEVER SEEN  ANYTHING LIKE  THAT ...
blocks.translation: AKU BELUM PERNAH MELIHAT YANG SEPERTI ITU...

blocks.text: WHISPER
HMPH !!!
THEY  JUST DECIDED  I  WAS  A  FAMILY
THEY JUST DECIDED I WAS A FAMILY HEIRLOOM ON THEIR OWN . THEY'VE NEVER ACTUALLY CARED FOR ME !
blocks.translation: MEREKA SENDIRI YANG PUTUSKAN AKU WARISAN KELUARGA. MEREKA TIDAK PERNAH PEDULI PADAKU!

blocks.text: WAAAH
PUSH
IF  HE'S  TRULY MY  MASTER ,  ASK  HIM TO  SAY  MY  REAL NAME !
blocks.translation: JIKA DIA BENAR-BENAR TUANKU, SURUH DIA BILANG NAMA ASLIKU!

blocks.text: SOB
LIGH ...
RUI  WANTS YOU  TO  SAY  HIS REAL  NAME .
blocks.translation: RUI INGIN KAMU MENGUCAPKAN NAMA ASLINYA.

blocks.text: LIH ...
THE  SWORD'S REAL  NAME ?
RUI ...
HEY ,  HE KNOWS  YOUR REAL  NAME .
blocks.translation: HEI, DIA TAHU NAMAMU YANG SEBENARNYA.

blocks.text: HE  PASSED ,  AND  IT HAD  NOTHING  TO  DO WITH  HIS  LOOKS
blocks.translation: DIA LULUS, DAN ITU TAK ADA HUBUNGANNYA DENGAN PENAMPILANNYA.

blocks.text: WHAT  DO  YOU MEAN ?  ALL  HE  SAID WAS  " RUI " !
AND  BESIDES , YOU  CALLED  ME THAT  IN  FRONT OF  HIM !
blocks.translation: LAGI PULA, KAU MEMANGGILKU DEMIKIAN DI DEPANNYA!

blocks.text: WELL ,  AN  ORDINARY PERSON  COULD  NEVER MEMORIZE  YOUR  FULL NAME  ANYWAY .
blocks.translation: YA, ORANG BIASA TIDAK MUNGKIN MENGINGAT NAMA LENGKAPMU.

blocks.text: HOW  COULD YOU  DO  THIS  TO ME ,  MASTER ?!
blocks.translation: BAGAIMANA KAU BERANI MELAKUKAN INI PADAKU, TUAN?!

blocks.text: WEEP
IN  ANY  CASE , I  CAN'T  GIVE  YOU THE  SWORD  BECAUSE  HE SAYS  THAT  YOU'RE  NOT HIS  MASTER .  NOW PLEASE  LEAVE .
blocks.translation: BAGAIMANAPUN, AKU TAK BISA MEMBERIKAN PEDANG ITU KARENA DIA BILANG KAU BUKAN TUANNYA. SEKARANG, SILAHKAN PERGI.

blocks.text: TRIUMPHANT
MISS  RIENNA .
THAT  SWORD'S  VALUE AND  SIGNIFICANCE  ARE BEYOND  WHAT  YOU CAN  IMAGINE ,
blocks.translation: NILAI DAN MAKNA PEDANG ITU MELEBIHI YANG KAU BAYANGKAN,

blocks.text: SO  I  CAN'T  JUST LEAVE  LIKE  THIS .
blocks.translation: JADI AKU TAK BISA BERDAMAI SAJA.

blocks.text: I  MUST  TAKE THAT  SWORD ,  EVEN  IF IT  MEANS  RESORTING TO  UNDERHANDED METHODS .
blocks.translation: AKU HARUS MEREBUT PEDANG ITU, MESKIPUN HARUS MENGGUNAKAN CARA LICIK.

blocks.text: UNDERHANDED METHODS ?
HE  HAS  A  WILL  OF  HIS OWN ,  SO  I  CAN'T  IGNORE HIS  WISHES  AND  HAND HIM  OVER  TO  YOU .
blocks.translation: DIA PUNYA KEINGINAN SENDIRI, JADI AKU TAK BISA MENGABAIKAN ITU DAN MEMBERIKANNYA PADAMU.

blocks.text: HIS  WILL ?  THAT THING  IS  A  WEAPON , A  SWORD .
WHAT'S IMPORTANT  HERE  IS YOUR  WILL .
I  DO  NOT  WISH  TO USE  FORCE  AGAINST A  FRAGILE  YOUNG WOMAN .
blocks.translation: AKU TAK INGIN MENGGUNAKAN KEKUATAN TERHADAP WANITA MUDA YANG LEMAH.

blocks.text: IF  I  HAPPENED TO  TELL  YOU  I  WAS  THE MOST  POWERFUL PERSON  IN THE  WORLD ,  WOULD  YOUR ANSWER  REMAIN THE  SAME ?
blocks.translation: JIKA KUBERITAHU KEPADAMU BAHWA AKU ADALAH ORANG PALING KUAT DI DUNIA, APA JAWABANMU MASIH SAMA?

blocks.text: OF  COURSE  MY ANSWER  WOULDN'T CHANGE .
blocks.translation: TENTU SAJA JAWABANKU TIDAK AKAN BERUBAH.

blocks.text: IN  THAT CASE ,  MISS RIENNA ...
ли
BY  UNDERHANDED METHODS ,  DID HE  MEAN ... ?
blocks.translation: METODE KURANG JELAS, APA DIA BERARTI...?

blocks.text: TAP
SHH ...
HUSH ,  MY  LITTLE KITTEN .
YOU  SHOULD BE  MORE  CAREFUL ABOUT  SAYING SUCH  WORDS !
blocks.translation: KAMU HARUS LEBIH HATI-HATI SAAT MENGUCAPKAN KATA-KATA SEPERTI ITU!

blocks.text: WHAT  WORDS ?
HUH ?
WEREN'T  YOU GOING  TO  PROPOSE A  CONTRACT MARRIAGE ?
blocks.translation: APA KAMU TIDAK BERENCANA MENGAJUKAN PERNIKAHAN KONTRAK?

blocks.text: WHY  WOULD YOU  SAY SOMETHING SO  ABSURD ?
blocks.translation: KENAPA KAMU MENGUCAPKAN HAL SEBEGITU BODOH?

blocks.text: WELL ,  YOU  DID SAY  " UNDERHANDED METHODS , "  DIDN'T YOU ?
blocks.translation: KAMU SENDIRI YANG BILANG "METODE KURANG JELAS", BUKANKAH?

blocks.text: AS  A  MARRIED  COUPLE , WE  WOULD  HAVE  COMMON OWNERSHIP  OVER  OUR POSSESSIONS ,
blocks.translation: SEBAGAI SUAMI ISTRI, KITA AKAN MEMILIKI HARTA MILIK BERSAMA,

blocks.text: AND  THE  ONLY LEGAL  WAY  TO  GET YOUR  HANDS  ON THIS SWORD ...
blocks.translation: DAN SATU-SATUNYA CARA HUKUM UNTUK MENGUASAI PEDANG INI...

blocks.text: ... IS  THAT ,  RIGHT ?
To  be  continued
La Yeondam
